name: Apple Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 inch Cinnamon, wrapped in Cheese cloth
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer apples, water, lemon peel, cinnamon, and maple syrup until apples are tender, about 20 minutes; remove cinnamon.
2. Puree soup in blender.
3. Return to saucepan.
4. Remove about a cup of liquid and combine it with arrowroot. When thickened, return to soup.
5. Stir in lemon juice, white wine. Heat through.
6. Serve with a spoonful of sour cream on each bowl.
